/opt/ST/STM32CubeCLT_1.18.0/GNU-tools-for-STM32/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m3 -g -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m3 -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -T/Users/chinhtranhuu/Personal/GIT/RTOS/STM32/STM32F103C8TX_FLASH.ld "CMakeFiles/stm32f103c8-freertos-template.elf.dir/Core/Src/main.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/stm32f103c8-freertos-template.elf.dir/App/Src/app_main.c.obj" -o stm32f103c8-freertos-template.elf
